package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_interface_map_for_typed_values: Layer: Data structure choice. Flag map[string]any used for homogeneous hot-path values where typed structs avoid assertions.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule519NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario519Negative(records []Rule519NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
